caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room that looks like a studio or clothing shop. His shirt features the white text "YOU NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background contains framed photographs on the wall, a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt, and racks of clothing. Two logos are visible on screen: a circular logo on the left and a red logo on the right that reads "BODILY TOT". Throughout the clip, the man is seen reacting to something, shifting his head and facial expressions while remaining seated. He starts by looking forward and slightly upward, then tilts his head down and to the side, eventually looking downward and away from the microphone.
